calendar.matters:
Ntc And Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery; And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar May-15-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff Creditors Trade association, Inc.'s motion to compel responses to post judgment discovery is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objections to plaintiff's special interrogatories and request for production of documents within 21 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $340 shall be paid within 21 days of notice of this order. Commissioner Bruce Chan. Not reported.

Notice And Motion For Award Of Post Judgment Atty'S Fees
Off Calendar Mar-11-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association's motion for post judgment attorneys fees is granted in the amount of $1,240. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN. Not reported.

Notice And Motion For Appointment Of Receiver And To Appoint Richard B. Cole As Receiver
Off Calendar Feb-29-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association's motion for appointment of a receiver is granted. No opposition has been filed. Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN. Not reported.
